title: bromus macrostachys var. danthoniae
intro: Bromus macrostachys var. danthoniae, also known as Danthonia grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the grass family, Poaceae. Traditionally, this plant is used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Danthonia grass include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Danthonia grass is often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
